case_title: MURPHY WOOD DESIGN LLC VS. REVL SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2010 - CONTINUED PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-26-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY WOOD DESIGN LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REVL SYSTEMS $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 15, 2011, RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE PRINTER 1200. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT REVL SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MURPHY WOOD DESIGN LLC $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, *****CORRECTED JUDGEMNT***** IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF MAY, NOT LATER THAT 15 DAYS AFTER DEFENDANT SATISFIES PLAINTIFF'S JUDGEMNT, RETURN DEFENDANT'S PRINTER. *****CORRECTED JUDGMENT***** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
